section: General
sentence: Effective Date: October 11, 2024

section: H2:I. INTRODUCTION
sentence: Turbofast.io (“we,” “us” or “our”) takes your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy (“Privacy Policy”) explains our data protection policy and describes the types of information we may process when you access and/or use our website, mobile applications, and services (collectively, the “Services”).

section: H2:I. INTRODUCTION
sentence: When we refer to personal data (or personal information), we mean any information relating to a natural person who can be identified, directly or indirectly, in particular by reference to an identification number or to one or more factors specific to their physical, physiological, mental, economic, cultural or social status.

section: H2:I. INTRODUCTION
sentence: Our Privacy Policy applies to all users and others who access our Services (“Users”). For the purposes of applicable data protection laws, we are the data controller, unless otherwise stated.

section: H2:I. INTRODUCTION
sentence: PLEASE READ THIS PRIVACY POLICY CAREFULLY FOR INFORMATION REGARDING THE WAYS YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION MAY BE PROCESSED. WHEN YOU USE OUR SERVICES, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ, UNDERSTOOD, AND AGREED TO BE BOUND BY THIS PRIVACY POLICY.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS
sentence: There are several categories of information that may be processed when you access and/or use our Services.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Information You Voluntarily Provide to Us
sentence: We may collect, store and process information about you when you create an account, use our Services, or contact our support team. When you interact with our Services, you may voluntarily provide us with certain information, such as your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you choose to provide. If you make a purchase, we collect payment information through our payment processors, though we do not store complete payment information on our servers.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Device Details and Log Data
sentence: Our Services automatically collect certain information about your device and how you interact with our Services. This includes technical information about your device (such as type of device, operating system, settings and system configurations, IP address, device ID and other unique identifiers) and usage information (such as time and duration of use, usage metrics, traffic data, logs and other communication data).

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Cookies and Similar Technologies
sentence: When you access and/or use our Services, we and our third-party partners may use cookies and similar technologies (like web beacons, pixels, and tags) to collect data to help us understand how you use our Services and to provide you with better experiences. This information may include browser type, pages viewed, time spent on pages, links clicked, and other usage information.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:APP-WISE PRIVACY CONTENT
sentence: To maintain complete transparency across all apps developed and published under Turbofast.io, we provide a detailed App-Wise Privacy Overview. This helps users understand what information is processed by each app individually and for what purpose.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Table of Contents for App-Wise Privacy
sentence: 1. Screen Mirroring | Cast to TV+

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Table of Contents for App-Wise Privacy

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Screen Mirroring | Cast to TV+
sentence: This app enables wireless screen mirroring between mobile devices and smart TVs. We may process device type, IP address, mirroring session information, and crash logs. The camera, microphone, gallery, and personal media are never accessed, recorded, stored, or transmitted. Data is used only to ensure stable connectivity, diagnose technical issues, and provide troubleshooting.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:InstantSave: Repost Story, Reel
sentence: This app allows users to paste public social media links to view reels, posts, or stories. Clipboard access occurs only when the user manually pastes a link—we do not monitor clipboard activities in the background. We do not collect social media credentials, browsing history, or third-party account information. Any media previewed belongs to the original owner, and the app does not download, store, or host third-party content on our servers.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:eSIM for Travel & Data: ViaSIM(iOS) / eSIM App: Global Data & Travel(Android)
sentence: Provides international digital SIM plans for calling and data connectivity. We collect email addresses, device compatibility information, location country (for eSIM distribution compliance), and payment status. All financial transactions are handled securely through third-party payment processors; we do not store complete payment details. Data is used strictly for order processing, activation, customer support, invoice history, and fraud prevention.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:eSIM for Travel & Data: ViaSIM(iOS) / eSIM App: Global Data & Travel(Android)
sentence: eSIM App: Global Data & Travel – Apps on Google Play

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:eSIM for Travel & Data: ViaSIM(iOS) / eSIM App: Global Data & Travel(Android)
sentence: Stay connected with global eSIM for nomads, affordable prepaid plans, no roaming

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Text Shield: Disposable Number
sentence: Provides disposable phone numbers for online privacy and secure texting/calling. We process device IDs, virtual number assignment, active subscription records, and analytics insights. We do not store or access message or call content, and private conversations are end-to-end encrypted where applicable. Data is used to prevent spam, maintain user authentication, and comply with telecom regulations.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:VPN – Free VPN Turbo Fast
sentence: Offers secure encrypted internet access and online anonymity. We may collect the selected VPN server region, connection timestamps, device model, and aggregated bandwidth statistics. We do not store browsing history, DNS queries, IP logs, search data, or online activity—full no-logs policy. Data helps identify server issues, maintain capacity, and prevent abuse while keeping user identity anonymous.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Device Finder: Find my Pods
sentence: Helps users track misplaced wireless audio devices using Bluetooth signal strength. We process approximate distance estimates between phone and Bluetooth accessories—no GPS location is stored. The app does not access microphone, audio recordings, media files, or precise geolocation. Data supports signal optimization, device detection, and troubleshooting accuracy.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Socratic AI: Math Help, Solver (Android)
sentence: AI-driven homework solving app providing step-by-step guidance using text or image input. Uploaded homework images and text are processed temporarily for AI results and then deleted automatically. No academic documents, photos, or personal notes are stored permanently. Data processed supports performance improvement, educational analytics, and making learning more interactive and personalized. For details regarding account removal and personal data erasure, please refer to our Account Deletion Policy.

section: H2:II. INFORMATION WE PROCESS > H3:Drawing Projector: AR Drawing(iOS) /AR Drawing: Trace, Draw Sketch(Android)
sentence: AR-based drawing and tracing app providing step-by-step sketch guidance using camera view or imported image input. Uploaded reference images, camera captures, and sketches are processed temporarily to enable AR tracing and drawing projection features and then deleted automatically. No personal photos, sketches, or camera content are stored permanently unless saved by the user. Data processing supports feature improvement, AR accuracy optimization, performance enhancement, and making drawing learning more interactive and engaging.. For details regarding account removal and personal data erasure, please refer to our Account Deletion Policy.

section: H2:III. THE PURPOSES OF PROCESSING YOUR DATA
sentence: Our mission is to constantly improve our Services and provide you with new and better user experiences. We use your information for several purposes:

section: H2:III. THE PURPOSES OF PROCESSING YOUR DATA
sentence: To Operate Our Services: We use your information to authenticate you, process your payments, and provide you with customer support. This includes sending you important notices and updates about our Services.

section: H2:III. THE PURPOSES OF PROCESSING YOUR DATA
sentence: To Improve Our Services: We analyze user behavior to understand how people use our Services, what features they interact with, and how we can make our Services better. This includes testing new features and monitoring performance.

section: H2:III. THE PURPOSES OF PROCESSING YOUR DATA
sentence: To Personalize Your Experience: We use information about your preferences and usage patterns to customize our Services to your interests and needs.

section: H2:III. THE PURPOSES OF PROCESSING YOUR DATA
sentence: To Communicate With You: We use your contact information to communicate with you about our Services, respond to your inquiries, and send you updates and promotional information (where permitted by law and your preferences).

section: H2:III. THE PURPOSES OF PROCESSING YOUR DATA
sentence: To Ensure Security: We use data to protect the security and integrity of our Services, including to detect and prevent fraud, unauthorized access, and other potential security incidents.

section: H2:IV. SHARING OF YOUR INFORMATION
sentence: We understand the importance of protecting your privacy and we carefully consider how your information is shared. We will not rent or sell your personal data to third parties, but we may share your information with third-party organizations that provide automatic data processing technologies for our Services. We do not control or influence these third parties’ tracking technologies or how they may be used.

section: H2:IV. SHARING OF YOUR INFORMATION > H3:Service Providers
sentence: We work with various service providers who help us operate, improve, and protect our Services. These providers may have access to your information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose. Our service providers include: – Cloud hosting providers for data storage

section: H2:IV. SHARING OF YOUR INFORMATION > H3:Service Providers
sentence: We work with various service providers who help us operate, improve, and protect our Services. These providers may have access to your information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose. Our service providers include: – Payment processors for handling transactions

sentence: We work with various service providers who help us operate, improve, and protect our Services. These providers may have access to your information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose. Our service providers include: – Analytics providers to help us understand user behavior

sentence: We work with various service providers who help us operate, improve, and protect our Services. These providers may have access to your information only to perform specific tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose. Our service providers include: – Customer support tools to assist with user inquiries

section: H2:IV. SHARING OF YOUR INFORMATION > H3:Legal Requirements
sentence: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests from public authorities (e.g., a court or government agency). We may also disclose your information if we believe disclosure is necessary to: – Comply with applicable laws and regulations

section: H2:IV. SHARING OF YOUR INFORMATION > H3:Legal Requirements
sentence: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests from public authorities (e.g., a court or government agency). We may also disclose your information if we believe disclosure is necessary to: – Enforce our terms and policies

section: H2:IV. SHARING OF YOUR INFORMATION > H3:Legal Requirements
sentence: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests from public authorities (e.g., a court or government agency). We may also disclose your information if we believe disclosure is necessary to: – Protect our rights, privacy, safety, or property

section: H2:IV. SHARING OF YOUR INFORMATION > H3:Legal Requirements
sentence: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests from public authorities (e.g., a court or government agency). We may also disclose your information if we believe disclosure is necessary to: – Protect against legal liability

section: H2:V. DATA SECURITY AND STORAGE
sentence: We take the security of your personal information seriously and implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data. We use industry-standard encryption protocols and software to protect your personal information during transmission and storage.

section: H2:V. DATA SECURITY AND STORAGE
sentence: For data storage purposes, we use reputable hosting providers that have passed our security and reliability standards. Your personal data is encrypted before being sent to our hosting providers for storage. However, please be aware that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure.

section: H2:VI. YOUR RIGHTS AND CHOICES
sentence: You have certain rights regarding your personal information. You may: – Access the personal information we hold about you

section: H2:VI. YOUR RIGHTS AND CHOICES
sentence: You have certain rights regarding your personal information. You may: – Request correction of any incomplete or inaccurate information

section: H2:VI. YOUR RIGHTS AND CHOICES
sentence: You have certain rights regarding your personal information. You may: – Request deletion of your personal information

section: H2:VI. YOUR RIGHTS AND CHOICES
sentence: You have certain rights regarding your personal information. You may: – Object to our processing of your information

section: H2:VI. YOUR RIGHTS AND CHOICES
sentence: You have certain rights regarding your personal information. You may: – Request restriction of processing

section: H2:VI. YOUR RIGHTS AND CHOICES
sentence: You have certain rights regarding your personal information. You may: – Request transfer of your information

section: H2:VI. YOUR RIGHTS AND CHOICES
sentence: – Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at https://turbofast.io/contact-us. We will respond to your request within the timeframe required by applicable law.

section: H2:VII. CHANGES TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY
sentence: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the “Last Updated” date. Your continued use of our Services after such modifications will constitute your acknowledgment of the modified Privacy Policy.

section: H2:VIII. CONTACT US
sentence: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please feel free to contact us at https://turbofast.io/contact-us.
